title: Project Manager (BMS / ELV)
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $6500 to $8500 + Variable Bonus + Allowances
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: West (5 mins walk to MRT)
  • Working hours: Monday to Friday (8:30am to 5:30pm)


Job Responsibilities:


  • Responsible for project deliverables and ensuring project is completed on time and within budget
  • Perform site management on the installation works, inspections, testing, commissioning and handing over of BMS / ELV Systems to clients
  • Analysing and management of project risk, cost and budget and contractual issue
  • Liaise with the clients, consultants, maincon / M&E team, sub-contractors and internal team and departments
  • Develop project schedules in compliance with customer requirements, deadlines, and/or milestones; track schedule progress in the field, and update the schedule regularly
  • Organising, guiding and motivating of engineers
  • Ensure all project activities are efficiently and cost-effectively executed throughout the project life cycle
  • Ensuring compliance to project scope and technical specifications


Requirements:



  • Diploma and/or Degree in Electrical or Electronics Engineering / Mechanical, Mechatronic Engineering / Building Technology or equivalent
  • Minimum 8 years’ experience in M&E / BMS in Construction or Engineering Industry
  • Understand System Design, Review Technical Specification including Quotation.
  • Knowledge in BMS System, such As System Architect, Controller Programming, On-Site Testing And Commissioning



Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume


  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

postedCompany.description:
EA Recruitment Pte Ltd was founded in 2021, with a focused mission, providing our utmost support to individuals and organisations, to achieve their full potential. With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Exceptional – We are dedicated to providing a holistic and an exceptional level of service to our clients.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
